name: signposts
description: Keep your AI coding agent on the rails — a rules repository that catches the mistakes your agent makes before they land, and learns new guardrails as you work.
author: Asim Hussain <asim@asim.dev>

scripts.//: All commands live in the justfile — run `just` to list them. Kept empty on purpose: ONE source of truth (enforced by the `no-package-scripts` rule in signposts.yaml). See ./justfile.
